name: Huabao Fund Management Co. Ltd. - S&P China A Shares Quality Value Index Fund
summary: Huabao Fund Management Co. Ltd. - S&P China A Shares Quality Value Index Fund is a fund managed by Huabao Fund Management that tracks the S&P China A Shares Quality Value Index. The fund invests in A-shares listed in China that exhibit characteristics of both high quality and value, aiming to provide long-term capital appreciation.
